mapper.select: SELECT u.`email`, u.`password`, u.`name`, u.`phone`, u.`car_model_id` AS `carModelId`, m.`model_name` AS `modelName`, b.`brand_name` AS `brandName`, u.`car_number` AS `carNumber`, u.`fuel_type` AS `fuelType`, u.`mileage`, u.`annual_mileage` AS `annualMileage`, u.`driving_env` AS `drivingEnv`, u.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, u.`social_type_code` AS `socialTypeCode`, u.`social_id` AS `socialId` FROM `car`.`users` u LEFT JOIN `car`.`car_models` m ON u.`car_model_id` = m.`model_id` LEFT JOIN `car`.`car_brands` b ON m.`brand_id` = b.`brand_id` WHERE u.`email` = #{email}

SELECT u.`email`, u.`password`, u.`name`, u.`phone`, u.`car_model_id` AS `carModelId`, m.`model_name` AS `modelName`, b.`brand_name` AS `brandName`, u.`car_number` AS `carNumber`, u.`fuel_type` AS `fuelType`, u.`mileage`, u.`annual_mileage` AS `annualMileage`, u.`driving_env` AS `drivingEnv`, u.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, u.`social_type_code` AS `socialTypeCode`, u.`social_id` AS `socialId` FROM `car`.`users` u LEFT JOIN `car`.`car_models` m ON u.`car_model_id` = m.`model_id` LEFT JOIN `car`.`car_brands` b ON m.`brand_id` = b.`brand_id` WHERE u.`social_type_code` = #{socialTypeCode} AND u.`social_id` = #{socialId}
mapper.update: UPDATE `car`.`email_tokens` SET `code` = #{token.code}, `salt` = #{token.salt}, `retry_count` = IF(`is_used` = TRUE, 0, `retry_count` + 1), `expires_at` = #{token.expiresAt}, `created_at` = NOW(), `is_verified` = FALSE, `is_used` = FALSE WHERE `email` = #{token.email} LIMIT 1
mapper.select: SELECT `email`, `code`, `salt`, `retry_count` AS `retryCount`, `is_verified` AS `isVerified`, `is_used` AS `isUsed`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `expires_at` AS `expiresAt` FROM `car`.`email_tokens` WHERE `email` = #{email} ORDER BY `created_at` DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT `brand_id` AS `id`, `brand_name` AS `name`, `brand_logo` AS `image` FROM `car`.`car_brands` ORDER BY `brand_name` ASC
SELECT `model_id` AS `id`, `model_name` AS `name` FROM `car`.`car_models` WHERE `brand_id` = #{brandId} ORDER BY `model_name` ASC
